infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tabibok Health needs camera access to allow you to capture and upload medical documents, prescriptions, and identification for your health records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tabibok Health needs photo library access to allow you to upload medical documents, prescriptions, and identification from your device.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tabibok Health uses your location to help you find nearby clinics and doctors.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any medical condition. It is a booking and communication platform for healthcare services.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera access to take photos for profile pictures and document uploads
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow access to photo library to select profile pictures and documents
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Vanbook needs permission to save documents to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vanbook uses your location to show nearby providers on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Vanbook uses your location to show nearby providers on the map.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow microphone access for video recording (if applicable)
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Vanbook sends notifications for appointment reminders and messages.
